Source assertion lines 1308 and 1414 verify code == .runtimeUnavailable.
Source assertion line 1415 verifies fail-closed detail contains 'readiness gate is not configured'.

summary: VAL-DAEMON-011 passed. BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests exited 0, all five VAL_DAEMON_011-tagged tests passed, and source assertions confirm explicit readiness reason codes plus fail-closed behavior when the gate is nil.
